sync._comment: Optional trade syncing to upstream API for PnL tracking

long_grid._description: LONG grid: Buy at each level, sell to take profit above. Good for bullish/ranging markets.

short_grid._description: SHORT grid: Sell at each level, buy to take profit below. Good for bearish markets.

neutral_grid._description: NEUTRAL grid: Buy below mid price, sell above. Good for ranging markets without direction.
neutral_grid._note: Grid builds around current price with both long and short sides

_liquidation_safety._description: The grid validates that liquidation prices are outside the trading range
_liquidation_safety._long_check: Liquidation price of long at end_price must be < start_price
_liquidation_safety._short_check: Liquidation price of short at start_price must be > end_price
_liquidation_safety._recommendation: Use lower leverage or wider grid range if validation fails
